ValidationRule.description: We can only allow users to change owners to the same OBC tag. GCE team can adjust to other company if needed. TBD/Blank need to be done by GCE
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_048: The new case owner must be a QUEUE only that contains AES or LSDX in the label. To change to a specific user or TBD cases, please request a data steward to make the change.
